ns0:entry.ns0:title: 4ian/GDevelop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/4ian/GDevelop
Language: javascript
🎮 Open-source, cross-platform 2D/3D/multiplayer game engine designed for everyone.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MarSeventh/CloudFlare-ImgBed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MarSeventh/CloudFlare-ImgBed
Language: javascript
🏖️ A serverless, open-source file hosting solution built on Cloudflare. Supports image hosting, secure file storage, and personal cloud drive capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhiskeySockets/Baileys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
Language: javascript
Socket-based TS/JavaScript API for WhatsApp Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Official remote MCP server for Atlassian. Securely connect Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code, and other AI tools using OAuth 2.1 or API tokens.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maillab/cloud-mail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maillab/cloud-mail
Language: javascript
A Cloudflare-based email service | 基于 Cloudflare 的邮箱服务 | Cloudflare Email 邮箱 Mail

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mui/material-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mui/material-ui
Language: javascript
Material UI: Comprehensive React component library that implements Google's Material Design. Free forever.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: naptha/tesseract.js
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/naptha/tesseract.js
Language: javascript
Pure Javascript OCR for more than 100 Languages 📖🎉🖥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rpamis/comet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rpamis/comet
Language: javascript
Comet: agent skill harness for turning ideas into evaluated workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trekhleb/javascript-algorithms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trekhleb/javascript-algorithms
Language: javascript
📝 Algorithms and data structures implemented in JavaScript with explanations and links to further readings

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarazhangrui/follow-builders
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/follow-builders
Language: javascript
AI builders digest — monitors top AI builders on X and YouTube podcasts, remixes their content into digestible summaries. Follow builders, not influencers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/frontend-slides
Language: javascript
Create beautiful slides on the web using a coding agent's frontend skills
